---
title: "Lord Frederick Charles Cavendish"
---

## Lord Frederick Charles Cavendish

**Dates:** (1836-6 May 1882)

### Description

politician

### Biography

He married (1864) the Hon. Lucy Caroline Lyttelton (1841-1925), whose sister was married to the Rev. Edward Stuart Talbot.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
